# PromptMatrix

> The control plane and behavior registry for multi-agent AI swarms. Register, version, approve, and hot-patch agent personas for LangGraph, CrewAI, and OpenClaw — without redeployment. MIT licensed.

PromptMatrix is the runtime behavior registry and control plane for multi-agent AI systems. Govern agent personas, tool schemas, and prompt versions for LangGraph, CrewAI, and OpenClaw orchestrators. Hot-patch any agent's behavior without restarting the swarm. Built by Matrix Labs. Free community edition available — self-host with Docker.

## Product

- [Landing page](https://promptmatrix.github.io/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://promptmatrix.github.io/privacy.html)
- [Terms of Service](https://promptmatrix.github.io/terms.html)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/PromptMatrix/Promptmatrix)
- [Matrix Labs Agency](https://matrixlabs.agency/promptmatrix.html)

## Key Features

- **Agent Persona Registry**: Store and version each agent's system prompt, backstory, and tool schema in one governed registry. Per-agent isolation.
- **Swarm Hot-Patching**: Change a running agent's behavior in PromptMatrix. The next task cycle picks it up — no swarm restart, no downtime.
- **LangGraph Integration**: Pull node system prompts and tool schemas from PromptMatrix at each graph invocation via pm.serve().
- **CrewAI Integration**: Store agent backstories and system prompts in PromptMatrix. Hot-patch drifting crew members mid-task.
- **OpenClaw Integration**: PromptMatrix was built alongside OpenClaw for swarm persona governance and tool schema versioning.
- **Prompt Version Control**: Git-style versioning for every LLM prompt and agent persona. Full audit trail.
- **Approval Workflows**: Require engineer approval before any behavior change reaches the swarm.
- **LLM-as-Judge Evals**: Automated quality gates using LLM evaluation before merge.
- **Sub-5ms Serving**: Production-grade prompt API serving with AES-256-GCM encryption. L1/L2 cache hit <5ms, miss <30ms.
- **Zero-redeploy Updates**: Update agent personas live without touching your codebase or restarting your swarm.

## Pricing

- **Community Edition**: Free, MIT licensed, unlimited local prompts, self-hosted.
- **Starter**: $29/mo — 100 prompts, 3 seats, 60 RPM. Managed cloud.
- **Pro**: $79/mo — 400 prompts, 5 seats, 200 RPM. LLM evals.
- **Scale**: $199/mo — 1,000 prompts, 10 seats, 500 RPM.
- **Founder**: $499 lifetime — 500 prompts, 5 seats, 100 RPM. Hardcapped at 100 orgs.
- **Enterprise**: Custom — 5,000+ prompts, SSO, dedicated infra, SLA.
